name: Uroica Precision Information Engineering Co.,Ltd
summary: Uroica Precision Information Engineering Co., Ltd. researches and develops, produces, and sells critical equipment for mine safety monitoring and production in China and internationally. Its products include ceremony roof monitors, mechatronic products, polymer grouting materials, and geophysical drilling technology output products. The company was formerly known as Uroica Mining Safety Engineering Co.,Ltd and changed its name to Uroica Precision Information Engineering Co., Ltd. in March 2017. Uroica Precision Information Engineering Co., Ltd. is based in Tai'an, China.
